final_source_tree.description: the repo working tree AFTER DISC-016/017/018/019/020 have merged; active sources under app/, hooks/, contexts/, server/, components/ (excluding components/discovery/) plus the route tree and drawer config

would_fail_if: the check scans nothing (empty file list → false pass)

steps: walk all active .ts/.tsx under app/, hooks/, contexts/, server/, and components/ (excluding components/discovery/**)

filter to those resolving to: route-discovery-screen, discovery-filter-bar, discovery-sort-toggle, route-pin, state-filter-sheet, state-list-item, intent-search-sheet, intent-summary-pill, discovery-empty-overlay, discovery-loading-overlay, or the components/discovery barrel

must_observe: scanned file count > 100 (proves the walk ran over the real tree)
must_not_observe: any active import of a quarantined module

scenario.verification_service: filesystem import-graph scan (real source tree) via vitest

would_fail_if: a drawer item navigates to a discover route

steps: render MenuLayout and assert no item navigates to a discover path

must_observe: drawer has 4 navigable surfaces (plan view via launch, Settings, Saved, Sessions) and none is a discover route
must_not_observe: a discover tab route file present
a drawer item with a discover/route-discovery pathname

scenario.verification_service: filesystem route-tree scan + MenuLayout render via @testing-library/react-native
